about.title: About
about.description: I’m a Software Developer with experience in backend, frontend, and enterprise system integrations. I hold a University Degree in Web Development (UNLaM) and have worked on international projects for the United States and Argentina, building solutions primarily using SQL and PeopleSoft Tools. My profile combines corporate environment experience with modern web application development. I work with technologies such as Node.js, React, Prisma, and MySQL, focusing on building scalable, well-structured, and user-oriented solutions. I’m interested in growing as a Full Stack Developer, strengthening both system architecture and code quality. I stand out for my adaptability, analytical thinking, and ability to work effectively in agile teams. My goal is to build technically solid products that create real impact, combining business logic, best practices, and a continuous improvement mindset.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Throughout my career, I've had the opportunity to work on diverse projects and collaborate with talented teams. Each experience has been a learning opportunity that contributed to my growth as a developer and shaped my approach to analyze problems, design solutions, and think about development beyond just the code.

items.title: Peoplesoft Developer
items.description: Development of solutions within PeopleSoft environments, building components, custom reports, and integrations for financial and HR systems. Contributed to projects for clients such as Banco Ciudad, Medifé, AFA, and Gideon Taylor, working in agile teams and collaborating on international projects using technical English.

items.title: Web Development Student
items.description: I completed professional practices in the web development area, participating in academic projects and collaborating with colleagues in creating applications using technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JAVA, PHP and SQL.

items.title: Tipear
items.description: Tipear is a web-based educational application designed to improve spelling and expand vocabulary among secondary school students through interactive game dynamics. The platform combines single-player and real-time multiplayer modes, incorporating engaging mechanics that promote active learning and healthy competition. It also includes teacher-focused features, allowing it to be effectively integrated into classroom environments. The project was developed with a strong focus on performance, scalability, and delivering a smooth user experience across both mobile and desktop devices.
items.stack: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS. Node.js, Express, Socket.IO, Prisma, MySQL. Railway (frontend, backend, and database deployment), GitHub (version control and continuous integration).

items.title: Love Español
items.description: Love Español is a web-based platform focused on promoting and selling Spanish language courses. The project combines a modern informational website with a structured online course sales system, prioritizing clarity, user experience, and conversion optimization. The frontend is built with a modern stack to ensure performance, responsiveness, and maintainable architecture. The platform integrates secure online payments and connects with a learning management system (LMS) to handle course delivery, student management, and academic content distribution. The main goal of the project is to provide a scalable and professional solution for managing, selling, and delivering digital courses by combining marketing, technology, and education into a single ecosystem.
items.stack: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Stripe (secure online payment integration), Hostinger (hosting and deployment), GoDaddy (domain management), Moodle LMS (course and learning management system)
